overrides.expect: M \cap \widetilde {U} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \{x \in \widetilde {U}: x ^ {n + 1} = \dots = x ^ {m} = 0 \} & \text {if p\notin\partial M}, \\ \{x \in \widetilde {U}: x ^ {n + 1} = \dots = x ^ {m} = 0 \text {and} x ^ {n} \geq 0 \} & \text {if p\in\partial M}. \end{array} \right.
overrides.new: M \cap \widetilde {U} = \left\{ \begin{array}{l l} \{x \in \widetilde {U}: x ^ {n + 1} = \dots = x ^ {m} = 0 \} & \text {if } p\notin\partial M, \\ \{x \in \widetilde {U}: x ^ {n + 1} = \dots = x ^ {m} = 0 \text {and} x ^ {n} \geq 0 \} & \text {if } p\in\partial M. \end{array} \right.

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \big (\widetilde {\gamma} _ {0} ^ {\prime} (0) \big) = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \circ d \varphi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (0)} \big (\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (0) \big) \quad \text {(definition of \widetilde {\gamma} _{0})} \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (0)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (0)\right) \quad (\text { because } \pi \circ \varphi = \pi) \\ = \gamma^ {\prime} (0) \quad (\text { because } \pi \circ \widetilde {\gamma} = \gamma) \\ = \gamma^ {\prime} (1) \quad (\gamma \text {   is   a   closed   geodesic }) \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (1)\right) \quad (\pi \circ \widetilde {\gamma} = \gamma \text {   again }) \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} _ {1} ^ {\prime} (0)\right) \quad (\text { definition   of } \widetilde {\gamma} _ {1}). \\ \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \big (\widetilde {\gamma} _ {0} ^ {\prime} (0) \big) = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \circ d \varphi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (0)} \big (\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (0) \big) \quad \text {(definition of } \widetilde {\gamma} _{0}\text{)} \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (0)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (0)\right) \quad (\text { because } \pi \circ \varphi = \pi) \\ = \gamma^ {\prime} (0) \quad (\text { because } \pi \circ \widetilde {\gamma} = \gamma) \\ = \gamma^ {\prime} (1) \quad (\gamma \text { is a closed geodesic }) \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} ^ {\prime} (1)\right) \quad (\pi \circ \widetilde {\gamma} = \gamma \text { again }) \\ = d \pi_ {\widetilde {\gamma} (1)} \left(\widetilde {\gamma} _ {1} ^ {\prime} (0)\right) \quad (\text { definition of } \widetilde {\gamma} _ {1}). \\ \end{array}
